final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input load,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    input shift_left,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
    );

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            data_out <= 8'b00000000;
        end else if (load) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end else if (shift_left) begin
            data_out <= data_out << 1;
        end else begin
            data_out <= data_out >> 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
